trigger: ISRG consecutive gap = 3 cycles (#61, 62, 63 all gone from active_structures). Revised 3-cycle exit rule fire per design. 雖然 entry 時 cross-check 也 confirm，但出場 rule 跟 entry rule 獨立。
lessons: First realized LOSS of session — clean small loss via rule-driven exit
ISRG 的 lifecycle pattern: 4-cycle entry build → 1-cycle gap → 3-cycle sustain → 3-cycle gap → exit. 總 hold 14 min
Eden 4-cycle persistence + cross-check STRONG CONFIRM 組合仍然無法預測每筆都賺 — edge 是 statistical 不是 deterministic
rule 執行的 discipline: 即使 cross-check 當時強 confirm + 持有期間小虧，仍按 rule exit，不 hope-and-hold
